name: @tempo-tune/monorepo
description: 메트로놈과 기타/베이스 튜너 기능을 제공하는 하이브리드 모바일 앱

scripts.qa: pnpm exec nx run-many -t type-check lint test && tsx scripts/qa/validate-feature-docs.ts && tsx scripts/qa/check-regression.ts
scripts.qa:affected: pnpm exec nx affected -t type-check lint test && tsx scripts/qa/validate-feature-docs.ts && tsx scripts/qa/check-regression.ts
scripts.qa:web: pnpm run qa && pnpm exec nx run web:e2e
scripts.qa:device: tsx scripts/qa/check-mobile-preflight.ts && tsx scripts/qa/bootstrap-device-run.ts && tsx scripts/qa/run-appium.ts
scripts.qa:device:ios-sim: QA_PLATFORM=ios QA_DEVICE_MODE=booted QA_REQUIRED_APPIUM_DRIVERS=xcuitest QA_IOS_BUNDLE_ID=com.rud.tempotune tsx scripts/qa/check-mobile-preflight.ts && QA_PLATFORM=ios QA_DEVICE_MODE=booted QA_IOS_BUNDLE_ID=com.rud.tempotune tsx scripts/qa/bootstrap-device-run.ts && QA_PLATFORM=ios QA_DEVICE_MODE=booted QA_IOS_BUNDLE_ID=com.rud.tempotune tsx scripts/qa/prepare-ios-simulator-app.ts && QA_PLATFORM=ios QA_DEVICE_MODE=booted QA_IOS_BUNDLE_ID=com.rud.tempotune tsx scripts/qa/run-appium.ts
scripts.qa:full: pnpm run qa:web && pnpm run qa:device
